purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: Post-R7 framework gap roadmap
aiflowTasks.objective: Analyze current non-community gaps against Gin, Echo, Fiber, Hertz, go-zero, Kratos, Kitex, and gRPC-Go after R7 convergence; define the R8 smallest executable task roadmap.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Machine-readable R8 roadmap, boundary inventory, non-community scope, task order, acceptance gates, and claim boundaries.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after the boundary inventory gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: HTTP migration compatibility proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Close HTTP migration compatibility gaps across route groups, path, query, header, body binding, middleware ordering, stable error envelopes, OpenAPI output, and invalid-request smoke cases.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: HTTP migration compatibility evidence linking migration surfaces to OpenAPI/runtime golden checks, invalid request smoke, and rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after HTTP migration compatibility gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Generated scaffold profile matrix
aiflowTasks.objective: Deepen goctl and Kratos scaffold trust with REST, RPC, model, production service, import alias, generated-only dependency, repeat diff, compile smoke, and rollback evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Generated scaffold profile matrix with deterministic output, dependency placement, compatibility, diff, compile, and rollback rows.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated scaffold profile gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: RPC streaming boundary evidence
aiflowTasks.objective: Keep Kitex and gRPC-Go transport gaps explicit while adding unary, server-stream, client-stream, bidi-stream, resolver, balancer, retry, deadline, auth, tracing, benchmark, and rollback evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: RPC streaming boundary evidence separating supported behavior, candidate surfaces, report-only latency, and rollback triggers.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC streaming boundary gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Adapter matrix runnable proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Make SQL, Redis/cache, and discovery adapters runnable and owned through smoke, observability, dependency trigger, fallback behavior, and rollback evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Runnable adapter matrix for SQL, Redis, local cache, cache invalidation, etcd, Kubernetes, Consul, Nacos, DNS, static discovery, observability, and rollback.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after adapter matrix gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Production reference topology drill
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote production-orders from example evidence toward reference topology drill evidence across memory mode, Docker-backed mode, SQL outbox, MQ, cache, discovery, OpenTelemetry, K8s assets, rollback, and failure evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Production reference drill evidence that adopters can run, observe, degrade, and roll back.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after production reference topology gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Plugin template publish protocol
aiflowTasks.objective: Turn plugin and template ecosystem assets into a publish protocol with registry schema, manifest schema, digest, signature, permission minimization, source policy, template contract, malicious path, and no partial write checks.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Publish protocol evidence for plugin and template registry compatibility, supply-chain safety, and failure isolation.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin/template publish protocol gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Release evidence tag CI closure
aiflowTasks.objective: Tie release snapshot, tag CI, checksum, SBOM, Docker digest, Trivy, provenance attestation, required checks, publish and block decisions, and rollback into one auditable release contract.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Release evidence and tag CI closure rows linking artifact producers, scans, provenance, checks, adopter decisions, and rollback actions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after release evidence and tag CI gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Performance budget ratchet depth
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote performance credibility through REST router, path params, JSON binding, middleware, OpenAPI, governance overhead, RPC unary and stream surfaces, allocation budgets, report-only latency, and unsupported-surface handling.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Performance ratchet evidence that keeps latency conservative and allocation blocking explicit.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after performance budget ratchet gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: R8 convergence evidence report
aiflowTasks.objective: Close the R8 governance batch by producing convergence evidence that all submitted R8 tasks have traceable artifacts, gates, commits, known risks, and follow-up ordering without committing runtime state.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final R8 convergence report with per-task commits, gate evidence, runtime ignored paths, known risks, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
